heading.title: We have been all over the **news**
heading.subtitle: Bengaluru's running community has caught the eye of the city's top publications. Here's what they're saying about Stride.

articles.title: Free clubs to run and socialise in Bengaluru
articles.excerpt: Running clubs in Bengaluru offer a vibrant mix of fitness, friendship, and community — and Stride is leading the charge with a growing pack of enthusiastic runners at Agara Lake.
articles.author: Barkha Kumari

articles.title: Bengaluru's social running clubs offer fun and fitness with a community twist
articles.excerpt: Social running clubs across Bengaluru are redefining fitness — turning early morning runs into lively community events that attract hundreds every weekend.
articles.author: News Karnataka

communityQuote.text: Joining Stride was the best decision I made this year. It's not just running — it's a family.
communityQuote.author: Kushagra Gupta
